title: Crappy Voice Chat
description: An addon for Simple Voice Chat that makes your mic sound like garbage noise
body:
# Crappy Voice Chat An addon to [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) that makes your microphone sound absolutely terrible! Upon opening the voice chat menu by pressing **V** you'll find two new buttons to the bottom right of the regular UI (see below) The microphone icon will toggle the crappy mic's effects on your voice, this will be turned on by default when you download the mod The gear icon will allow you to fine tune the crappy mic's effects to your heart's content! Things such as packet loss, bitcrushing, EQ, and hiss are all customizeable

### New buttons ![buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f5a9c315d2c2c6f5edd095375adc126ae23d0c4.png) # ### Config ![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/726aace0ffce9a4de7175c7518cf5c426c6fe5b3_0.webp)
